title: YouTuber Who Murdered Girlfriend Used 6-Hour Pre-Recorded GTA Stream As Alibi
summary_full: Irish man faked a six-hour livestream to mislead police after killing his pregnant girlfriend.
summary_public: Irish man faked a six-hour livestream to mislead police after killing his pregnant girlfriend.

IE.label: neutral
